problem_text_cn: 两块足够大的金属平板平行放置，温度恒定分别为$100^\circ\text{C}$（$T_1=373\ \text{K}$）和$10^\circ\text{C}$（$T_4=283\ \text{K}$），两板间抽成真空，插入同样大小的两块平行板（共四块板），四块板表面均涂黑（视为绝对黑体）。求：1. 插入的两块板的温度；2. 板间的能量流与其间不插两板时能量流的比值。
problem_text_en: Two sufficiently large metal plates are placed in parallel, with constant temperatures of $100^\circ\text{C}$ ($T_1=373\ \text{K}$) and $10^\circ\text{C}$ ($T_4=283\ \text{K}$) respectively. The space between the two plates is evacuated, and two parallel plates of the same size are inserted (total four plates). All surfaces of the four plates are blackened (treated as absolute black bodies). Find: 1. The temperatures of the two inserted plates; 2. The ratio of the energy flux between the plates to that without inserting the two plates.
problem_solution_cn: （1）插入板温度计算（第1问）：- 黑体辐射规律：由斯特藩-玻尔兹曼定律，黑体单位面积辐射功率$R = \sigma T^4$（$\sigma$为斯特藩常量）。- 热平衡条件：设插入两板温度为$T_2$（板2）、$T_3$（板3）。对板2，左侧净能流密度$\dot{Q}_{2\text{左}} = \sigma(T_1^4 - T_2^4)$，右侧净能流密度$\dot{Q}_{2\text{右}} = \sigma(T_3^4 - T_2^4)$，热平衡时$\dot{Q}_{2\text{左}} + \dot{Q}_{2\text{右}} = 0$，得$T_2^4 = \frac{1}{2}(T_1^4 + T_3^4)$；对板3，同理得$T_3^4 = \frac{1}{2}(T_2^4 + T_4^4)$。- 联立求解：代入$T_1=373\ \text{K}$、$T_4=283\ \text{K}$，解得$T_2 = \sqrt[4]{\frac{2T_1^4 + T_4^4}{3}} \approx 350\ \text{K}$（$77^\circ\text{C}$），$T_3 = \sqrt[4]{\frac{2T_4^4 + T_1^4}{3}} \approx 322\ \text{K}$（$49^\circ\text{C}$）。（2）能量流比值计算（第2问）：- 插入两板时：热平衡时相邻板间能流密度相等，$\dot{Q} = \sigma(T_1^4 - T_2^4) = \sigma(T_2^4 - T_3^4) = \sigma(T_3^4 - T_4^4)$，联立得$\dot{Q} = \frac{1}{3}\sigma(T_1^4 - T_4^4)$。- 不插入两板时：板1与板4间能流密度$\dot{Q}_0 = \sigma(T_1^4 - T_4^4)$。- 比值：$\frac{\dot{Q}}{\dot{Q}_0} = \frac{1}{3}$。
problem_solution_en: （1）Calculation of temperatures of inserted plates (Question 1):- Blackbody radiation law: By the Stefan-Boltzmann law, the radiant power per unit area of a black body is $R = \sigma T^4$ ($\sigma$ is the Stefan constant).- Thermal equilibrium condition: Let the temperatures of the two inserted plates be $T_2$ (plate 2) and $T_3$ (plate 3). For plate 2, the net energy flux density on the left is $\dot{Q}_{2\text{left}} = \sigma(T_1^4 - T_2^4)$, and on the right is $\dot{Q}_{2\text{right}} = \sigma(T_3^4 - T_2^4)$. At thermal equilibrium, $\dot{Q}_{2\text{left}} + \dot{Q}_{2\text{right}} = 0$, leading to $T_2^4 = \frac{1}{2}(T_1^4 + T_3^4)$; for plate 3, similarly, $T_3^4 = \frac{1}{2}(T_2^4 + T_4^4)$.- Solving simultaneously: Substituting $T_1=373\ \text{K}$ and $T_4=283\ \text{K}$, we get $T_2 = \sqrt[4]{\frac{2T_1^4 + T_4^4}{3}} \approx 350\ \text{K}$ ($77^\circ\text{C}$), $T_3 = \sqrt[4]{\frac{2T_4^4 + T_1^4}{3}} \approx 322\ \text{K}$ ($49^\circ\text{C}$).（2）Calculation of energy flux ratio (Question 2):- With inserted plates: At thermal equilibrium, the energy flux density between adjacent plates is equal, $\dot{Q} = \sigma(T_1^4 - T_2^4) = \sigma(T_2^4 - T_3^4) = \sigma(T_3^4 - T_4^4)$. Combining to get $\dot{Q} = \frac{1}{3}\sigma(T_1^4 - T_4^4)$.- Without inserted plates: The energy flux density between plate 1 and plate 4 is $\dot{Q}_0 = \sigma(T_1^4 - T_4^4)$.- Ratio: $\frac{\dot{Q}}{\dot{Q}_0} = \frac{1}{3}$.
problem_answer: 1. 插入两板温度分别为$T_2 \approx 350\ \text{K}$（$77^\circ\text{C}$）和$T_3 \approx 322\ \text{K}$（$49^\circ\text{C}$）；2. 能量流比值为$\dfrac{1}{3}$
